name: SAM Check Cashing Machine
description_short: Cleveland's SAM Check Cashing Machine at 2747 Cedar Ave, OH provides quick check cashing services.
description_long:
SAM Check Cashing Machine is located at 2747 Cedar Ave in Cleveland, OH as a standalone check-cashing service. This Cleveland location serves residents and visitors who need quick access to cash without the typical delays of traditional banking institutions. Operating as a check-cashing specialist, this location handles various check-related transactions for the community.

To access services at this Cleveland, OH location, customers can call +1 216-771-2126 for information on check-cashing rates, processing times, and any documentation requirements. The staff is prepared to handle personal checks, business checks, and other check-related financial services specific to what residents in Cleveland need.

When visiting the 2747 Cedar Ave location in Cleveland, bring a valid photo ID and your check—standard requirements for any check-cashing transaction. SAM Check Cashing Machine provides a convenient, straightforward alternative to waiting for bank teller services.
pros: Self-service automated model eliminates waiting for teller assistance
Extended hours (7:30 AM–10 PM daily, open 7 days a week) provide maximum accessibility
Low fees according to customer review feedback
Available every single day of the week with no closures
Located in West Cleveland neighborhood with street-level access
Simple, straightforward check cashing process per customer testimonial
cons: Extremely limited public information about fee structures and terms
Only 1 customer review available, insufficient for reliable quality assessment
No details provided about check limits, maximum amounts, or accepted check types
Unclear what identification requirements are needed for check cashing
No information about additional services beyond basic check cashing
Unclear whether machines accept all check types or have restrictions
best_for: Shift workers and night-shift employees needing access outside standard business hours
Customers who prefer self-service transactions without staff interaction
People seeking lower-cost check cashing alternatives to traditional storefronts
diagnosis: SAM Self-Service Check Cashing is best suited for customers in Cleveland's West Side who need check cashing access during extended hours and prefer self-service machine transactions with low fees. The critical caveat is the near-total lack of publicly available information about fees, check limits, identification requirements, and operational constraints—customers should call (440) 532-0239 directly to verify service capabilities before relying on this provider.
services: Extended-hours check access (7:30 AM–10 PM daily)
meta_description: SAM Check Cashing Machine at 2747 Cedar Ave, Cleveland, OH. Fast check cashing services.
